name: L-4 extract-patterns populates usefulness_estimate within the 1 to 5 range per the architecture per-pattern field
command: printf '%s' '{"number":1,"comments":[{"body":"please add null check before dereferencing"}]}' > pr.json && bash "$CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT/pr-corpus/extract-patterns.sh" --pr pr.json --out patterns.json 2>/dev/null && node -e 'const a=JSON.parse(require("fs").readFileSync("patterns.json","utf8"));process.exit(a[0].usefulness_estimate>=1&&a[0].usefulness_estimate<=5?0:1)' && echo ranged 1>&2
